episodes.title: Full Deposition: Hillary Clinton Responds to Epstein Questions
episodes.description:
Former Secretary of State Hillary Rodham Clinton testified under oath before the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform as part of its investigation into Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell 

During the deposition, lawmakers questioned Clinton about:
Her knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell
Alleged connections to the Clinton Foundation and Clinton Global Initiative
President Bill Clinton’s past travel with Epstein
Intelligence community speculation surrounding Epstein
The release and handling of Epstein-related files

Clinton stated she does not recall ever meeting Jeffrey Epstein and denied knowledge of his criminal activities before they became public 

She also addressed broader concerns about transparency, accountability, and the federal government’s handling of sex trafficking investigations.

This deposition is part of a broader congressional effort to review the government’s investigation and prosecution of Epstein and Maxwell.
